case_title: ABU GHOSH, MUSA VS EARL SCHEIB, INC. #455

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABU GHOSH, MUSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARL SCHEIB, INC. #455 $496.26 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $511.26 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
